name: Find the Nibbys!
author: Poki
description: Find the Nibbys! is an adventure game where your mission is simple but fun, track down all the adorable Nibbys scattered across the island! Each one comes with its own unique style and hidden places, and along the way you’ll discover exciting side missions to keep the adventure fresh. Ready to explore, collect, and meet every single Nibby? How to play Find the Nibbys!? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Camera: hold mouse button to rotate camera angles Jump: the space bar Run: Shift Chest: F Who created Find the Nibbys!? Find the Nibbys! is created by Buldogo Games. Play their other games on Poki: World Conquest ! How can I play Find the Nibbys! for free? You can play Find the Nibbys! for free on Poki. Can I play Find the Nibbys! on mobile devices and desktop? Find the Nibbys! can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
